_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of hardware components and architecture including functions and limitations.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of BI platform capabilities (e.g., Power BI, Tableau, Looker, MicroStrategy) including data model design, calculated field logic, performance optimization, and security implementation.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI AB domain. AB-K-006 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AI-K-016 (AI, cosine: 0.504), DQ-K-014 (DQ, cosine: 0.493).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 3.8/10 (raw 0.384). Shared vocabulary: [knowledge]. DCWF-only terms [architecture, components, functions, hardware, limitations] vs WIDAI-only terms [bi, calculated, capabilities, data, design, field] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.872 (P=0.909, R=0.838). P exceeds R by 0.071 — the DCWF element's 10 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 23 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: contradiction-dominant (99.7%). Despite 'Intersects with' classification, the model detects semantic tension between "Knowledge of hardware components and architecture including functions and limita" and "Knowledge of BI platform capabilities (e.g., Power BI, Tableau, Looker, MicroStr". Indicates these concepts operate in adjacent but distinct professional domains — shared vocabulary, different application context.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.512 > STS 0.384 (gap +0.128). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [knowledge] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 14.3%. Shared tokens: [knowledge]. DCWF-only: [architecture, components, functions, hardware, limitations]. WIDAI-only: [bi, calculated, capabilities, data, design, field].
